case_title: JENNIFER J. LIU VS. SALUD ANA LUCIA CORDOVA SALAS

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, JENNIFER J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAS, SALUD ANA LUCIA CORDOVA ORDONEZ, JOSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1036 INNES AVE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, JENNIFER J. AS TO DEFENDANT SALAS, SALUD ANA LUCIA CORDOVA ORDONEZ, JOSE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, JENNIFER J.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, JENNIFER J. AS TO DEFENDANT SALAS, SALUD ANA LUCIA CORDOVA ORDONEZ, JOSE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SALAS, SALUD ANA LUCIA CORDOVA ORDONEZ, JOSE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, JENNIFER J. SERVED MAY-09-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SALAS, SALUD ANA LUCIA CORDOVA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, JENNIFER J. SERVED MAY-29-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORDONEZ, JOSE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SALAS, SALUD ANA LUCIA CORDOVA ORDONEZ, JOSE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SALAS, SALUD ANA LUCIA CORDOVA ORDONEZ, JOSE
